title: eryngium columnare
intro: Eryngium columnare, also known as Sea Holly or Columned Sea Holly, is a perennial plant species in the carrot family native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Eryngium columnare include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestive health, as well as its antimicrobial properties that may aid in wound healing. Eryngium columnare can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional folk remedies.
